title: StudyNotion
text: StudyNotion is an online education platform offering full stack developer courses, hands-on projects, and mentorship. Learn MERN, deployment, and more.

title: Web Development Course
text: This course covers HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, and deployment using Vercel and Docker.

title: Cancellation Policy
text: You can cancel your course within 7 days for a full refund. After that refund depends on the course policy.
